name: BMW M3

name: Audi RS3
description: The Audi RS5 combines luxury and performance with a sleek coupe design and Quattro AWD.

description: The Ford Ranger Raptor 3.0 V6 Bi-Turbo 4x4 D/C/A/T- Unleash the Beast.

name: BMW 340i

name: Toyota Supra

description: A high performance sports car, the most track-focused RS model in the 911 lineup, know for its radical aerodynamics, extensive lightweight construction, and motorsport-derived features.
